calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Confirming Trustee And Trust Assets
Off Calendar Apr-09-2013 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jeanette Fisher-Kouadio for Beverly Phillips.

The Court stated that there was not enough to meet Hegstad to get the property into the Trust. Counsel presented oral argument to support her position. The Court denied the Petition for Order Confirming Trustee and Trust Assets.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Benton.

Petition For Order Confirming Trustee And Trust Assets
Off Calendar Mar-18-2013 Continued To Apr-09-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
